targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroup(sub.time_bucket, '$__interval', 0) AS time,
  MAX(CASE WHEN sub.metric_count = 0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "Brak Danych (tło)"
FROM (
  SELECT
    $__timeGroup(cmr.timestamp, '$__interval', 0) AS time_bucket,
    COUNT(cmr.value) AS metric_count
  FROM screenwatcher.collector_metricreading cmr
  WHERE
    cmr.machine_id = '534cdb2b-39f3-4eb1-9e36-f107cfc3e687'
    AND cmr.name = 'speed_m2h'
    AND $__timeFilter(cmr.timestamp)
  GROUP BY 1
) AS sub
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

WITH CombinedMachineData AS (
  SELECT
    mr.timestamp,
    mr.machine_id,
    mr.value AS speed_m2h,
    mc.value AS current_idle_state_key,
    LAG(mc.value, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY mc.machine_id ORDER BY mr.timestamp) AS prev_idle_state_key
  FROM screenwatcher.collector_metricreading mr
  LEFT JOIN screenwatcher.collector_metriccontext mc ON
    mr.timestamp = mc.timestamp AND mr.machine_id = mc.machine_id AND mc.key = 'idle_state_key'
  WHERE
    mr.machine_id = '534cdb2b-39f3-4eb1-9e36-f107cfc3e687'
    AND mr.name = 'speed_m2h'
    AND $__timeFilter(mr.timestamp)
)
SELECT
  $__timeGroup(cmd.timestamp, '$__interval', 0) AS time,
  MAX(CASE
    WHEN cmd.speed_m2h IS NULL THEN 0.0 -- Data Gap
    WHEN cmd.current_idle_state_key IS NOT NULL AND cmd.current_idle_state_key <=> cmd.prev_idle_state_key THEN 0.8 -- Machine Idle
    WHEN cmd.speed_m2h > 10 THEN 1.0 -- Working
    ELSE 0.8 -- Default to idle/stopped if not working or data gap
  END) AS "Status"
FROM CombinedMachineData cmd
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

WITH CombinedMachineData AS (
  SELECT
    mr.timestamp,
    mr.machine_id,
    mr.value AS speed_m2h,
    mc.value AS current_idle_state_key,
    LAG(mc.value, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY mc.machine_id ORDER BY mr.timestamp) AS prev_idle_state_key
  FROM screenwatcher.collector_metricreading mr
  LEFT JOIN screenwatcher.collector_metriccontext mc ON
    mr.timestamp = mc.timestamp AND mr.machine_id = mc.machine_id AND mc.key = 'idle_state_key'
  WHERE
    mr.machine_id = '534cdb2b-39f3-4eb1-9e36-f107cfc3e687'
    AND mr.name = 'speed_m2h'
    AND $__timeFilter(mr.timestamp)
)
SELECT
  $__timeGroup(cmd.timestamp, '$__interval', 0) AS time,
  CASE WHEN cmd.current_idle_state_key IS NOT NULL AND cmd.current_idle_state_key <=> cmd.prev_idle_state_key THEN 0 ELSE cmd.speed_m2h END AS "Prędkość (m2/h)"
FROM CombinedMachineData cmd
WHERE
  cmd.speed_m2h <= 450 
ORDER BY time

WITH CombinedMachineData AS (
  SELECT
    mr.timestamp,
    mr.machine_id,
    mr.value AS speed_m2h,
    mc.value AS current_idle_state_key,
    LAG(mc.value, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY mc.machine_id ORDER BY mr.timestamp) AS prev_idle_state_key
  FROM screenwatcher.collector_metricreading mr
  LEFT JOIN screenwatcher.collector_metriccontext mc ON
    mr.timestamp = mc.timestamp AND mr.machine_id = mc.machine_id AND mc.key = 'idle_state_key'
  WHERE
    mr.machine_id = '534cdb2b-39f3-4eb1-9e36-f107cfc3e687'
    AND mr.name = 'speed_m2h'
    AND $__timeFilter(mr.timestamp)
),
MachineStatus AS (
    SELECT
        cmd.timestamp,
        cmd.machine_id,
        CASE
            WHEN cmd.speed_m2h > 10 THEN 'RUNNING'
            WHEN cmd.current_idle_state_key IS NOT NULL AND cmd.current_idle_state_key <=> cmd.prev_idle_state_key THEN 'STOPPED'
            ELSE 'STOPPED'
        END AS status
    FROM CombinedMachineData cmd
),
CalculatedDurations AS (
    SELECT
        ms.timestamp,
        ms.status,
        TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, ms.timestamp, LEAD(ms.timestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY ms.machine_id ORDER BY ms.timestamp)) AS duration_s
    FROM MachineStatus ms
)
SELECT
    cd.timestamp AS "time",
    cd.duration_s AS "Mikroprzestoje (15s-5min)"
FROM CalculatedDurations cd
WHERE
    cd.status = "STOPPED"
    AND cd.duration_s >= 15
    AND cd.duration_s <= 300
ORDER BY cd.timestamp ASC

WITH CombinedMachineData AS (
  SELECT
    mr.timestamp,
    mr.machine_id,
    mr.value AS speed_m2h,
    mc.value AS current_idle_state_key,
    LAG(mc.value, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY mc.machine_id ORDER BY mr.timestamp) AS prev_idle_state_key
  FROM screenwatcher.collector_metricreading mr
  LEFT JOIN screenwatcher.collector_metriccontext mc ON
    mr.timestamp = mc.timestamp AND mr.machine_id = mc.machine_id AND mc.key = 'idle_state_key'
  WHERE
    mr.machine_id = '534cdb2b-39f3-4eb1-9e36-f107cfc3e687'
    AND mr.name = 'speed_m2h'
    AND $__timeFilter(mr.timestamp)
),
MachineStatus AS (
    SELECT
        cmd.timestamp,
        cmd.machine_id,
        CASE
            WHEN cmd.speed_m2h > 10 THEN 'RUNNING'
            WHEN cmd.current_idle_state_key IS NOT NULL AND cmd.current_idle_state_key <=> cmd.prev_idle_state_key THEN 'STOPPED'
            ELSE 'STOPPED'
        END AS status
    FROM CombinedMachineData cmd
),
CalculatedDurations AS (
    SELECT
        ms.timestamp,
        ms.status,
        TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, ms.timestamp, LEAD(ms.timestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY ms.machine_id ORDER BY ms.timestamp)) AS duration_s
    FROM MachineStatus ms
)
SELECT
    cd.timestamp AS "time",
    cd.duration_s AS "Dłuższe przestoje (>5min)"
FROM CalculatedDurations cd
WHERE
    cd.status = "STOPPED"
    AND cd.duration_s > 300
ORDER BY cd.timestamp ASC
